login.title: Legal AI Analyzer
login.subtitle: Secure, citation-backed analysis of your case communications. We only access what you explicitly authorize.

dashboard.safetyGateDescription: Review conversation metadata below and explicitly select which threads you authorize for analysis. Message content is never accessed until you authorize it.
dashboard.personFilterPlaceholder: Filter by sender — type a name or email and press Enter
dashboard.syncSectionLabel: Sync from Gmail — fetches new data only, doesn't filter the list below
dashboard.searchSectionLabel: Search — filters the thread list below
dashboard.syncFromGmailTitle: Fetch metadata for threads matching the current filters
dashboard.refreshAuthorizedTitle: Check already-authorized threads for new messages and re-extract them
dashboard.noThreadsHint: Try clicking "Sync from Gmail" to pull in fresh data.
dashboard.storyTitle: Generate a cited narrative summary of this thread
dashboard.toastLoadFailed: Failed to load threads from the database.
dashboard.toastRefreshSuccessWithUpdates: Checked {{checked}} authorized thread(s), re-extracted {{reExtracted}} updated thread(s).
dashboard.toastRefreshSuccessNoUpdates: Checked {{checked}} authorized thread(s) — no new messages.
dashboard.toastAuthorizePartialFailure: {{count}} thread(s) failed to extract — consent was still recorded.

consent.descriptionSingle: By authorizing this thread, you confirm you have the right to share this communication data and consent to it being processed and securely stored for case analysis. Message content is only accessed for threads you explicitly authorize.
consent.descriptionPlural: By authorizing these threads, you confirm you have the right to share this communication data and consent to it being processed and securely stored for case analysis. Message content is only accessed for threads you explicitly authorize.

askAI.title: Ask AI
askAI.description: Ask a question about your authorized communications. Answers are grounded only in your data — if it's not there, the AI will say so instead of guessing.
askAI.placeholder: e.g. Did Mr. John reply late to emails about the lease?
askAI.errorDefault: Failed to get an answer. Please try again.

syncPreview.title: Review threads before syncing
syncPreview.description: These threads match your current Sync filters, fetched live from Gmail. Nothing is saved yet — uncheck any you don't want, then confirm.
syncPreview.noResults: No threads match your Sync filters.

threadStory.title: Thread Story
threadStory.description: A chronological narrative of this conversation, generated from the sanitized messages — every claim is cited back to a specific message.
threadStory.errorDefault: Failed to generate the story. Please try again.

extracted.sanitizedNote: Cleaned, stored version used for case analysis — signatures, disclaimers, and quoted replies have been removed.
extracted.notAuthorizedYet: This thread hasn't been authorized/extracted yet.
